description_long: This object is a simple, elongated knife or sword with a sharply pointed, triangular blade and a flat, uniform surface. The blade appears to be straight-edged, tapering to a fine tip, and is constructed from a single piece of material without any visible handle demarcation or guard. The surface is matte and light gray, suggesting it is made from paper or a lightweight, non-metallic material. There are no visible decorative elements, engravings, or texturing on the blade or handle area. The object is thin and flat, with a consistent thickness throughout its length. Its minimalist design and lack of ergonomic features indicate it is likely a stylized or toy representation rather than a functional weapon.
description: A flat, pointed, triangular knife or sword with a matte light gray surface and no visible handle or ornamentation. The design is minimalist and appears to be made from a single piece of material.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thin, flat profile and sharply pointed tip.
description_view_1: Top-down view revealing the triangular blade shape and symmetrical edges.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the thin, flat profile and pointed tip.
description_view_3: Bottom view displaying the V-shaped taper and straight edges converging at the tip.
attribute_handle_design: integral with blade, flat, no visible grip or ergonomic features
